entry.title: IDC W15P7T10DD421 (P00018) awarded to AASKI TECHNOLOGY INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: W4GV USA HQ COMM ELECT CMD

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 889(A)(1)(B) OF THE JOHN S. MCCAIN NATIONAL DEFENSE AUTHORIZATION ACT FOR FISCAL YEAR 2019 AND FEDERAL ACQUISITION REGULATION (FAR) 1.108(D), THE FOLLOWING PROVISION AND CLAUSE HAVE BEEN INCORPORATED INTO THIS CONTRACT: - FAR PROVISION 52.204-24, REPRESENTATION REGARDING CERTAIN TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND VIDEO SURVEILLANCE SERVICES OR EQUIPMENT. - FAR CLAUSE 52.204-25, PROHIBITION ON CONTRACTING FOR CERTAIN TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND VIDEO SURVEILLANCE SERVICES OR EQUIPMENT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15P7T10DD421 (P00019) awarded to AASKI TECHNOLOGY INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: RAPID RESPONSE - THIRD GENERATION (R2-3G) PROFESSIONAL AND TECHNICAL SUPPORT SERVICES MULTIPLE AWARD INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY CONTRACT IN SUPPORT OF THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE AND OTHER FEDERAL AGENCIES. ACTION IS TO UPDATE THE ADMIN OFFICE.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
